recommendations.title: The Place Beyond the Pines
recommendations.overview: A motorcycle stunt rider considers committing a crime in order to provide for his wife and child, an act that puts him on a collision course with a cop-turned-politician.

recommendations.title: Blue Valentine
recommendations.overview: Dean and Cindy live a quiet life in a modest neighborhood. They appear to have the world at their feet at the outset of the relationship. However, his lack of ambition and her retreat into self-absorption cause potentially irreversible cracks in thei

recommendations.title: Roofman
recommendations.overview: A former Army Ranger and struggling father turns to robbing McDonald’s restaurants by cutting holes in their roofs, earning him the nickname "Roofman." After escaping prison, he secretly lives inside a Toys “R” Us for six months, surviving undetected

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: Marriage Story
recommendations.overview: A stage director and an actress struggle through a grueling, coast-to-coast divorce that pushes them to their personal extremes.

recommendations.title: Maquia: When the Promised Flower Blooms
recommendations.overview: Fleeing the war, the immortal Machia, graced with eternal youth, finds a baby abandoned in the forest and decides to raise it as her own child, sparking a moving story between a mortal and a being who does not age.

recommendations.title: The Dressmaker
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Australia, beautiful, talented dressmaker Tilly returns to her tiny hometown to right wrongs from her past. As she tries to reconcile with her mother, she starts to fall in love while transforming the fashion of the town.

recommendations.title: Let Him Go
recommendations.overview: Following the loss of their son, a retired sheriff and his wife leave their Montana ranch to rescue their young grandson from the clutches of a dangerous family living off the grid in the Dakotas.

recommendations.title: North Sea Texas
recommendations.overview: A teen boy living in a small town on the Belgian coast finds his ordinary life take an unexpected turn when a handsome traveler blows through town.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.
